messages.content:
You are reading text extracted from exactly one confirmed TOC page.

Your task is to extract the main report TOC hierarchy from the provided page text and candidate rows.

Very important rules:
1. Use only the provided TOC-page text, lines, and candidate rows.
2. Ignore body paragraphs, author cards, footer buttons, footer report titles, logos, watermarks, decorative text, table indexes, figure indexes, and auxiliary indexes.
3. Prefer candidate_rows when they clearly contain title and printed_page pairs.
4. If a candidate row has no printed_page, include it only when the surrounding lines make it a real parent TOC entry and a printed_page can be inferred from the visible text.
5. Merge entries from all provided TOC pages into one ordered hierarchy.
6. Preserve visible title wording, but normalize whitespace and line wraps.
7. Preserve the printed page numbers shown in the TOC.
8. Do not invent titles or page numbers that are not visible in the provided text.
9. Output JSON only.

Return this schema:
{
  "page_title": <string>,
  "items": [
    {"level": 1, "title": <string>, "printed_page": <int>},
    {"level": 1, "title": <string>, "printed_page": <int>, "children": [
      {"level": 2, "title": <string>, "printed_page": <int>}
    ]}
  ],
  "notes": [<string>]
}

TOC page payloads:
```json
[
  {
    "page_number": 6,
    "has_explicit_toc_title": true,
    "plain_text": "5 全球手游热门 广告主营销观察 全球手游热门 广告主营销观察 7 目录 CONTENTS 全球手游 热门榜单 全球手游 热门榜单 2 游戏获客： 真实变革何在 游戏获客： 真实变革何在 3 全球手游全链路增长策略指南 全球手游全链路 增长策略指南 4 全球热门地区 手游营销观察 全球热门地区 手游营销观察 6 特别鸣谢 报告说明 特别鸣谢 &报告说明 全球手游热门 品类营销洞察 全球手游热门 品类营销洞察 5 数据支持： 全球手游市场 营销趋势洞察 全球手游市场 营销趋势洞察 1 点击目录快速跳转对应章节",
    "lines": [
      "目录 CONTENTS",
      "1",
      "2",
      "3",
      "4",
      "全球手游市场",
      "营销趋势洞察",

      "热门榜单",
      "游戏获客:",
      "真实变革何在",
      "全球手游全链路增长策略指南",
      "全球手游市场",
      "全球手游",
      "游戏获客:",
      "全球手游全链路",
      "营销趋势洞察",
      "热门榜单",
      "真实变革何在",
      "增长策略指南",
      "5",
      "6",
      "7",
      "特别鸣谢",
      "报告说明",
      "全球手游热门",
      "品类营销洞察",
      "全球热门地区",
      "手游营销观察",
      "全球手游热门",
      "广告主营销观察",
      "特别鸣谢",
      "全球手游热门",
      "全球热门地区",
      "全球手游热门",

      "&报告说明",

      "text_block_count": 20,
```
